body:
`go test ./internal/provider/anthropic -count=1` cannot complete locally because `internal/provider/anthropic/conformance_test.go` panics when `httptest.NewServer` fails to bind: `listen tcp6 [::1]:0: socket: operation not permitted`.
`go test ./... -count=1` cannot complete locally for the same sandbox networking reason across multiple httptest-based packages, including `service_http_provider_test.go`, `cmd/agent/update_test.go`, and `internal/provider/anthropic/conformance_test.go`.

post-merge review: BLOCK (flagged for human)

`go test ./... -count=1` cannot complete locally for the same sandbox networking reason across multiple httptest-based packages, including `service_http_provider_test.go`, `cmd/agent/update_test.go`, and `internal/provider/anthropic/conformance_test.go`.
